title: Dyschoriste affinis
taxonomy: Dyschoriste affinis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It belongs to the genus Dyschoriste, which is a group of plants native to tropical and subtropical regions. The species Dyschoriste affinis is further classified within the Acanthaceae family as a type of flowering plant that produces small, trumpet-shaped flowers. Dyschoriste affinis is native to tropical Africa, specifically in countries such as Ghana, Nigeria, and the Democratic Republic of the Congo. This classification is based on the plant's physical characteristics, growth habits, and distribution.
